name: gws
description: Official Google Workspace CLI for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service with structured JSON output and headless CI authentication support.

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install gws: npm install -g @googleworkspace/cli or brew install googleworkspace-cli

commands.description: Passthrough to gws CLI for any Google Workspace command

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install gws: npm install -g @googleworkspace/cli or brew install googleworkspace-cli. Authenticate with: gws auth setup
